Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Herald]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — A Herald is a type of beast/entity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — The nature of Heralds is a secret for anyone below Archlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — A Herald can pit the full might of their spirit and will against another.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — Xorrus is a Herald.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — The Herald's body is smaller than Sophara's head in her current form.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 13''' — Killing too many cultists could draw the attention of the enemy Herald.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — The Herald of the dragons had not yet annihilated them from a thousand feet up.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 24''' — Fury watches for Heralds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — A Herald's spirit and body are one.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — A Herald's power allows their body to shift between spiritual and physical forms.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — Mercy is associated with a tiny Herald.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — A stable Herald would not be affected as much by the suppression field as Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 11''' — Being a Herald is described as a bumpy path full of sharp rocks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — A Herald is a type of being that Lindon was uncertain how the Empty Palm would affect.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — As a Herald, Yerin's body and spirit have a unique relationship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Advancing to Herald will make Lindon a Monarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 9''' — No one below Sage or Herald is believed to have the ability to survive and alter the labyrinth's workings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 11''' — Yerin is a Herald.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — A Herald's Remnant is a type of Remnant that can be tempered in Archlord soulfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 14''' — Yerin described the creature's spiritual presence as feeling like half a dozen Heralds stitched together.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — Heralds can send out techniques that blot out spiritual perception.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 20''' — A Herald possesses significant spiritual pressure.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 20''' — A Herald can appear as a black-and-white copy of an expert from the past.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 20''' — The Herald is capable of weaving through arrows with speed that appears as a blur.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Reigan Shen was a Herald.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — A Herald of the Eight-Man Empire is a member of that group.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — Herald is a stage of advancement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — Ziel viewed himself as more of a Herald than a Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — Heralds can fly through portals.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 14''' — Heralds are supposed to be physically stronger than Sages.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 14''' — Heralds are invulnerable to forces without will behind them.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 14''' — A Herald's body is as tough as an Archlord's.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 16''' — A Herald is being pushed back by the Sages.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — A newborn Herald appears on the deck of Redmoon Hall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — The King's army techniques are collectively like a Herald.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — A Herald walked into Malice's strongholds.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — Little Blue's eventual advancement goal is to reach Herald.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Herald is a potential path or rank for Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 7''' — The Path of Seven Pages prepares the spirit for Herald.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — The Twin Dragon Rejuvenation Pill helps Archlords synchronize spirit and body to bring them closer to Herald.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — Mercy can borrow the power of a Herald.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 16''' — Yerin killed a Herald.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 17''' — Spirits reach Herald by forming their spirits into a body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Orthos and Little Blue were a new Sage and Herald respectively.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — A Herald's body is a type of physical state.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 25''' — The seventh page of the Book is meant to be mastered when one is a Herald.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 25''' — The energy in the page is meant to take one to Herald.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — It is hard to capture an average Herald.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
